subject: [OOM] Disable VID
commit_message:
[OOM] Disable VID

VID is unmaintained and shouldn't be installed by default

Issue-ID: OOM-2921
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I47d0ba365838f4673c9997648f6a066c217d66f1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4582/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4582/ )
